step_rationale: Neutrophil serine protease; extracellular matrix degradation; cap destabilization.
mechanism: Proteinase 3 released by activated neutrophils degrades fibrous-cap matrix proteins, promoting cap thinning and rupture.

references.title: Novel Insights Into the Effects of Interleukin 6 Antagonism in Non-ST-Segment-Elevation Myocardial Infarction Employing the SOMAscan Proteomics Platform.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
